fixture.title: Catalog Recorded Importer Fixtures
fixture.summary: Synthetic VNDB dump, EGS (ErogameScape) SQL-endpoint recorded-response, DLsite storefront, Steam storefront, IGDB platform, and Wikidata platform fixtures for deterministic external-source importer verification without live network access.

license.evidence: Hand-authored synthetic VNDB-shaped dump rows, EGS (ErogameScape)-shaped SQL response rows, DLsite-shaped storefront metadata, Steam-shaped appdetails responses, IGDB-shaped platform metadata, and Wikidata-shaped entity statements; no third-party raw assets, private catalog payloads, or credentials.

provenance.author: Itotori contributors
provenance.creationMethod: Hand-authored synthetic public metadata fixtures for CATALOG-011, CATALOG-012, and CATALOG-013 recorded importer provenance and idempotency tests.

aggregateStats.notes: Covers VNDB external ids, titles, releases, language facts, source-version provenance, EGS (ErogameScape) game ids, gamelist title/brand/release fields, Japanese-audience score facts, DLsite cross-links where present, DLsite product identity, work_type, release metadata, translation_info trees, demand facts, Steam appdetails envelopes, supported-language metadata, package/delisting status, IGDB platform releases and language supports, Wikidata entity links, external ids, language statements with qualifiers, official-English conflict facts, fetched-at/request identity provenance, rate-limit metadata, semantic diagnostics, and CATALOG-065 idempotent reruns.
